response: Welcome! Your current inventory shows no assets to list or sell, meaning no revenue can be generated. Your immediate focus should be on building your asset pipeline.

suggested_tasks.title: **Source New Assets
suggested_tasks.description: ** Actively identify and acquire promising digital assets to build your initial inventory.

suggested_tasks.title: **Asset Approval Process
suggested_tasks.description: ** Define and apply your criteria to approve new assets for quality and compliance.

suggested_tasks.title: **Prepare for Listing
suggested_tasks.description: ** Create compelling descriptions, visuals, and pricing for approved assets to get them ready for sale.
